name: Return of Pointer Value Outside of Expected Range
description: A function returns a pointer to memory that is outside the buffer the pointer is expected to reference. This can lead to reading or modifying memory outside intended boundaries, causing crashes or information disclosure.
detection_pattern: A TRANSFORM node performing pointer arithmetic or buffer operations returns a pointer value to a calling TRANSFORM node without a CONTROL[bounds_check] mediator validating that the returned pointer falls within the expected memory buffer range.
